zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Chesney於1044年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利勒 可斯尼時，他的父親Walter Radulphus de Chesnay20歲，母親Gladys verch Rhiwallon24歲。他於大約1068年與Lady Maud de Waterville在英國素可韋斯特 霍阿利結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1086年之後在英國諾福爾可，埋葬在英國諾福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph de Chesney于1044年出生在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利勒 可斯尼时，他的父亲Walter Radulphus de Chesnay20岁，母亲Gladys verch Rhiwallon24岁。他于大约1068年与Lady Maud de Waterville在英国素可韋斯特 霍阿利结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1086年之后在英国諾福爾可，埋葬在英国諾福爾可。

en.Le Quesney, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Norman: Le Quesney, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chesney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Antrim, Down): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac (an) tSasanaigh, see McChesney .
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Chaney  , a cognate of 3 below.
French: topographic name for someone who lived by or in an oak wood, from Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’ (from chesne ‘oak’). Compare Cheney 2.

variants.name: McChesney
meanings: Scottish (Galloway) and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac (an) tSasanaigh ‘son of the Saxon (i.e. the Englishman)’. The spelling seems to represent Mac Shasanaigh, to be pronounced originally as McHasney, rather than the English spelling ch.

variants.name: Chestnut
meanings: Scottish (Renfrewshire and Lanarkshire) and northern Irish: altered form of Chesney , shortened from McChesney . Its assimilation to the English word chestnut is due to folk etymology, the word itself being first recorded in 1519. The surname was probably taken to Ireland at the time of the 17th-century Plantation of Ulster.
English (Norfolk): probably a variant of Chestney (see Chaney ), altered by folk etymological association with the word chestnut.

variants.name: Chesna
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Chesney  .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Chesney was born in 1044, in Le Quesney, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Walter Radulphus de Chesnay, was 20 and his mother, Gladys verch Rhiwallon, was 24. He married Lady Maud de Waterville about 1068, in West Hoathly, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. He died after 1086, in Norfolk, England, and was buried in Norfolk, England.

fr.Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales: Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph de Chesney est né en 1044, à Le Quesney, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Walter Radulphus de Chesnay, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Gladys verch Rhiwallon, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Lady Maud de Waterville environ 1068, à West Hoathly, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé après 1086, à Norfolk, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph de Chesney 1044 in Le Quesney, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Radulphus de Chesnay 20 und seine Mutter Gladys verch Rhiwallon 24. Er hat um 1068 in West Hoathly, Sussex, England Lady Maud de Waterville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb nach 1086 in Norfolk, England und wurde in Norfolk, England begraben.

ht.Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales: Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Chesney è nato il nel 1044 nel Le Quesney, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Walter Radulphus de Chesnay, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Gladys verch Rhiwallon, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Lady Maud de Waterville circa 1068, nel West Hoathly, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1086, nel Norfolk, England, e fu sepolto a Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Chesneyが1044年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメル クエスニーで生まれた時，父Walter Radulphus de Chesnayは20歳，母Gladys verch Rhiwallonは24歳であった。約1068年にイギリススセックスウエスト ホーアスリーでLady Maud de Watervilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1086年以後にイギリスノーフォルクで死去し，イギリスノーフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Chesney(이)가 1044년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 일 크스니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Radulphus de Chesnay(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Gladys verch Rhiwallon(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1068년 영국 수세스 웨스트 호슬리에서 Lady Maud de Waterville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1086년 이후 영국 노르폴크에서 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크에 묻혔다.

mn.Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales: Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Уэльс, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Chesney nasceu em 1044, em Le Quesney, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Walter Radulphus de Chesnay, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Gladys verch Rhiwallon, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Maud de Waterville aproximadamente 1068, em West Hoathly, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1086, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ro.Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales: Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Chesney родился в 1044 г. в местности л куесни, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Walter Radulphus de Chesnay было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Gladys verch Rhiwallon, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Maud de Waterville около 1068 г. в местности вест хоатли, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер после 1086 г. в местности норфолк, Англия и был похоронен в местности норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph de Chesney nació en 1044, en Le Quesney, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Walter Radulphus de Chesnay, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Gladys verch Rhiwallon, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Lady Maud de Waterville aproximadamente 1068, en West Hoathly, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1086, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Norfolk, Inglaterra.
